name: Textron Inc.
description: Textron Inc. is a multi-industry company that leverages its global network of aircraft, defense, industrial, and finance businesses to provide customers with innovative solutions and services. Known for its powerful brands such as Bell, Cessna, Beechcraft, Pipistrel, Jacobsen, Kautex, Lycoming, E-Z-GO, Arctic Cat, and Textron Systems, the company operates in the aerospace and defense, specialized vehicles, turf care, and fuel systems industries. Textron is a leader in vertical lift, business aviation, and mission-critical systems, delivering advanced technology and high-performance products to commercial and military customers worldwide.
